title: eye protection
description: This can effectively protect your eyes.
body:
Supports versions 1.21.4 to 1.6
Can effectively protect your eyes.
"eye protection" is a material pack
Note:This is an extremely “eye-friendly” resource pack.
All non-solid blocks now feature vibrant colors.
Water has also become opaque! Perfect for players with lower-end computer setups!
↑ Players with poor eyesight may disregard the above message :).
The content of this project is to replace all the materials with moiré patterns, making the world you see very peculiar. You will also see some strange phenomena.If you think games are monotonous, why not try the world of Moiré patterns?
